extra.reason: Bundled remote league logos as static assets; no more Wikimedia fetch for them

Re-implemented HockeyTech SOCKS5 proxy support on dev from scratch (orphaned branch test/hockeyTechProxy had unmergeable conflicts). Same params/env toggles. Tests: 34/36 pass; the 2 WHL failures are pre-existing on clean dev.

Use own-property existence check instead of truthiness for custom font selection in drawContents; empty style-flags string for Regular-weight fonts no longer reads as unregistered. Also fixed swapped league/title args in error-fallback drawContents call.

Added TheSportsDBAthleteProvider (free-key search-by-name, sport-guarded, ~30d data/link cache, no image caching) and boxing league (TSDB 4445, LEAGUES_ENABLE_BOXING). Verified Canelo/Fury resolve, Garcia rejected, league badge resolves, and a matchup thumbnail renders.

Documented boxing: supported-leagues.md (Boxing section under Combat Sports, no-flag note, examples, name-matching caveat, TheSportsDB Athlete provider config example), technical-details.md (TheSportsDB Athlete Provider subsection), README supports line.

Snapshot regression harness added: test/snapshots/snapshot.js + README, npm run snapshot/snapshot:update, committed manifest.json (43 cases). Verified update+check both clean, 43/43 pixel-identical on no-op re-run.

Extracted helpers/shadows.js with named SHADOWS profiles + setShadow/resetShadow; replaced all inline ctx.shadow* blocks across logoGenerator, thumbnailGenerator, genericImageGenerator, imageUtils. 43/43 snapshot cases pixel-identical; test failures (2 WHL) pre-existing.
Added standard-update.hook.sh (POSIX, /info-polling, docker-free) + standard-deployment.md; syntax + live parse verified

Root cause: shared chl.ca portal scrape returned wrong/empty HockeyTech client_code, poisoning WHL config+teams cache with OHL data. Fixed by pinning explicit clientCodes (whl/ohl/lhjmq) in leagues.json and relaxing getLeagueConfigAsync to accept clientCode-only configs (apiKey falls back to provider default). providers.test.js 36/36.

Added base-vs-head pixel-regression CI job (.github/workflows/pixel-regression.yml) + snapshot --soft mode; verified locally (clean pass, regression fail, soft-error pass). CI-green confirmation will land on the next PR.

Unified thumb/cover/logo via createImageRoute factory + shared renderMatchup tail in helpers/routeUtils.js. Route files 727->242 LOC. Verified pixel-identical (43/43 snapshot cases), full test suite passes, live spot-checks OK.

Added loadProcessedLogo + calculateCenteredDimensions to helpers/imageUtils.js; replaced ~24 download/trim/loadImage triples and ~20 aspect-centering blocks across the 3 generators. Verified pixel-identical (43/43 snapshot cases) and full test suite green.

Added loadProcessedLogo + calculateCenteredDimensions to helpers/imageUtils.js; replaced ~24 download/trim/loadImage triples and ~20 aspect-centering blocks across the 3 generators. Verified pixel-identical (43/43 snapshot cases) and full test suite green.
Superseded by game-thumbs-htw: the badge validate->base-cache->generate-or-reuse->overlay pattern was extracted as renderMatchup in helpers/routeUtils.js during the route unification.

Split imageUtils.js (1539 LOC) into helpers/image/{draw,imageIO,logoResolution,badge}.js behind a thin re-export shim (78 LOC) preserving the exact 26-name API. Pure code move; verified pixel-identical (43/43) and full test suite green.

Added drawCenteredLogo(ctx,logo,x,y,boxSize,shadowProfile) to helpers/image/draw.js; replaced 14 box-centered logo draws across logoGenerator/thumbnailGenerator. logoGenerator 772->667 LOC. Verified pixel-identical (43/43) and full test suite green. Skipped the diagonalSplit background dedup: its skipLogos vs main branches differ in equal-color handling (untested by the snapshot matrix), not safe to unify.

Removed dead drawLogoWithOutline, getWhiteLogo, and hasLightOutline (+ OUTLINE_WIDTH_PERCENTAGE/EDGE_BRIGHTNESS_THRESHOLD consts, unused Image/logger imports) from helpers/image/draw.js; dropped the two shim re-exports; fixed stale shadows.js comment. draw.js 442->293 LOC. Grep-clean, pixel-identical (43/43), full test suite green.

Removed the three shadowed (earlier) definitions of nrl/top14/super-rugby from leagues.json (contiguous block, -45 lines). JSON.parse already kept the later defs, so parsed config is byte-identical (verified) and behavior unchanged; 157 keys, each key now appears once. League Tests 465/465 and full suite green. Differing espnSlugs in the dead copies (top14 8005, super-rugby 8326) were already ignored; correct-slug verification is a separate data-accuracy concern.

Added ProviderManager.getLeagueLogoPair(league) returning {logoUrl,logoUrlAlt}; replaced the 5 getLeagueLogoUrl(false)+(true) pair sites (leaguecover, leaguethumb, logo styles 5/6, routeUtils league-case + team-fallback). Pixel-identical (43/43), full suite green.

Removed 3 dead alpha-0 ('rgba(255,255,255,0)') stroke blocks (logoGenerator diagonal split; thumbnailGenerator split diagonal + horizontal) and the now-dead DIAGONAL_LINE_EXTENSION const. Invisible under source-over so pixel-identical (43/43), full suite green.

Added config/constants.js (DIMENSIONS, DIAGONAL_SPLIT with documented logo-vs-thumbnail difference, THUMBNAIL + LOGO multiplier groups); replaced literals across logoGenerator/thumbnailGenerator/genericImageGenerator + routes/thumb,cover,logo. Pure rename, NO value changes; pixel-identical (43/43), full suite green. Left one-off spacing literals (0.05/0.95-margins/etc.) inline per focused scope.

Deleted test/ncaa.test.js.DISABLED (NCAA covered by aliases/fallback/providers; was a slow live suite) and test/performance.test.js.DISABLED (load test, not CI-suitable); removed the already-broken test:ncaa/test:performance npm scripts. Full suite green.

All cleanup children complete (regression harness + CI gate, route unification, Group A helpers, imageUtils split, generator decomposition, dead-code removal, league-key dedup, league-logo pair helper, dead-stroke removal, named constants, disabled-test cleanup). aip detached as a deferred feature (gated on #85). Every change verified pixel-identical via the snapshot harness + full test suite.

Added badge= support beyond matchup routes: extracted applyBadgeWithCaching helper (base-image cached overlay) in routeUtils.js and applied it to league thumb/cover (makeDefaultLeagueHandler), single-team thumb/cover (makeDefaultTeamHandler, refactored to a render-closure), and logo style=1 for both league and single-team. Matchup path refactored onto the same helper (byte-neutral). Pixel-identical (43/43), full suite green, live-verified badged output for league + single-team thumb/cover/logo-style1 incl. fallback.

Decomposed express.js (465->44 LOC) into app/middleware.js (applyMiddleware), app/routeLoader.js (registerRoutes: health + auto-load + error handler + catch-all), and app/lifecycle.js (startServer: listen + provider warm-up + timeouts + monitoring + graceful shutdown, owns server/provider state). init() is now a thin orchestrator. Behavior-preserving: pixel-identical (43/43), full suite green incl. server-behavior 11/11, live-verified health/route/444/favicon/SIGTERM. xcproxy filter left intact in routeLoader for mu3.4.

Behavior-preserving: pixel-identical (43/43), full suite green incl. server-behavior 11/11, live-verified health/route/444/favicon/SIGTERM. xcproxy filter left intact in routeLoader for mu3.4.

Behavior-preserving: pixel-identical (43/43), full suite green incl. server-behavior 11/11, live-verified health/route/444/favicon/SIGTERM. xcproxy filter left intact in routeLoader for mu3.4.

Removed xcproxy entirely. Deleted routes/xcproxy.js + docs/api-reference/xc-proxy.md; stripped the APP_MODE/xcproxy branch+filter from app/routeLoader.js (now plain .js load); removed the xcproxy npm script, the Dockerfile APP_MODE env+comments, the docs index entry, and the dead XC_PROXY='false' lines from 8 tests + snapshot.js. APP_MODE/XC_PROXY now fully gone. Grep-clean (code+docs), pixel-identical 43/43, full suite green, /xcproxy now 444.

Moved all app code into src/ (index.js, leagues.js, app/, config/, generators/, helpers/, providers/, routes/) via git mv preserving structure (intra-src requires unchanged). Fixed 6 __dirname->root paths (+1 ..), package.json main/scripts, Dockerfile CMD, test requires+spawns, scripts/ require, and url-validator's require.resolve. Also consolidated express.js INTO index.js (deleted express.js; index.js now builds+wires+boots; espn-fallback switched to require-auto-boot). Data/runtime (leagues.json, teams.json, assets/, json/, logs/, .cache/) stay at root. Verified: pixel-identical 43/43, full suite green, node src/index.js boots, .cache/logs at repo root.
All cleanup children complete, including the express.js decomposition, xcproxy removal, and the src/ move (+ express->index consolidation). Repo root is now clean of app code.
Implemented: added allowSvg option to downloadImage; switched all league/team logo fetch sites to downloadImageWithSvgSupport

Audit complete via explore pass. Findings: 9 undocumented env vars (THESPORTSDB_API_KEY, HOCKEYTECH_API_KEY, CBL_SUPABASE_API_KEY, HOCKEYTECH_PROXY_EXTRACT, HOCKEYTECH_PROXY_FEED, LOG_DIR, LOG_ROTATION_SIZE, SCRAPER_USER_AGENT, SOCKS_PROXY); /health endpoint undocumented; no .env.example; matchup/league API stub redirects; tennis cache warning buried. All gaps addressed in pq3.2 and pq3.5.

Added Advanced Configuration sections to docker.md (Provider API Keys, Logging, Network/Proxy) covering all 9 undocumented env vars. Created .env.example at repo root with all vars organized by section.
Created docs/api-reference/health.md documenting /health endpoint (response fields, example curl, Docker healthcheck pattern). Added /health to api-reference index.md table and quick reference list.

docker.md prose pass: added build-from-source section (Docker + bare Node), promoted tennis warning to {: .warning} callout with cache volume cross-link, consolidated two docker-compose examples into one with inline comments for both volume styles.

Getting started redo: docs/index.md rewritten to 3-step fast path with health check verification and curl example. League count corrected from 30+ to 100+ throughout. Style count corrected from 4+ to 6. Health check added to endpoint table.
Top-level alignment: README.md 30+ corrected to 100+. docs/contributing.md is already correctly concise with quick links.

Dedup pass: replaced team-matching.md Docker Volume Mount + Use Cases sections with cross-references to customization.md/docker.md (removed ~90 lines of near-duplicate content). Trimmed technical-details.md Feeder Leagues section to one example + link to team-matching.md. Fixed ESPN provider '30+' claim to '100+'.

Example completeness: fixed style range '1-4' → '1-6 (98,99)' in thumb.md and cover.md (accuracy bug). Added curl examples to raw-data.md and server-info.md. Cover.md, logo.md, ncaa-route.md already have complete examples. Stub redirect files (matchup-*.md, league-*.md) are nav_exclude:true redirects by design.
All 8 sub-issues complete: accuracy audit, env hub, docker redo, getting-started redo, api-reference restructure, top-level alignment, dedup/prose quality, example completeness.
